product_overview: FitnessPro is a web application for gym members and coaches to manage bookings, training programs, and progress tracking. Members can book sessions, track weight and follow programs; coaches can manage availability, create programs, and monitor member progress.
core_goals: Enable members to securely log in, book training sessions, follow personalized training programs, and track weight progress.
Provide coaches with tools to manage availability, create and assign training programs, and monitor member sessions and progress.
Offer clear role-based navigation and dashboards with interactive charts and responsive UX.
Persist data via a RESTful API while highlighting local JSON storage limitations for testing.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow members and coaches to authenticate with email and password and be redirected to role-appropriate dashboards.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with member@gym.com -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button -> See redirect to /dashboard -> See upcoming sessions and training program summary
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with coach@gym.com -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button -> See redirect to /coach-dashboard -> See today's sessions schedule and member list
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with invalid@example.com -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button -> See error message on invalid credentials -> Remain on /login

features.name: Member Dashboard
features.description: Show members an overview of upcoming sessions, program progress, weight stats, and daily tasks with navigation to other sections.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View upcoming sessions -> View training program progress -> View weight tracking stats -> Click 'Programs' menu -> Navigate to /programs
Navigate to /dashboard without authentication -> See redirect to /login

features.name: Session Booking
features.description: Let members browse available coaching slots, select a slot, add booking notes, and confirm bookings.
user_flows: Navigate to /booking -> View available training slots -> Select a time slot -> Enter booking notes -> Click Confirm booking -> See booking confirmation -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See booked session listed
Navigate to /booking -> View available training slots -> Select a time slot that is full -> Enter booking notes -> Click Confirm booking -> See error message 'slot unavailable' -> Remain on /booking

features.name: Training Programs
features.description: Display personalized training plans with exercises, nutrition guides, daily tasks, and allow members to mark tasks complete.
user_flows: Navigate to /programs -> View training program details -> View fitness center exercises tab -> View nutrition guide tab -> Mark a daily task as completed -> See task marked completed
Navigate to /programs -> Open a program -> Click Save changes while offline or without permission -> See error message 'unable to update program' -> Remain on program page

features.name: Weight Tracking
features.description: Allow members to record weight entries tied to dates and view progress on interactive charts and statistics.
user_flows: Navigate to /weight-tracking -> Enter current weight -> Select date for entry -> Click Submit weight entry -> See success confirmation -> View weight progress chart updated
Navigate to /weight-tracking -> Enter non-numeric weight -> Select date for entry -> Click Submit weight entry -> See validation error 'enter a valid weight' -> Remain on weight entry form

features.name: Coach Dashboard
features.description: Provide coaches with a consolidated view of today's sessions, member lists, and quick links to program management and member progress.
user_flows: Navigate to /coach-dashboard -> See today's sessions schedule -> Click a member from the list -> View member progress stats and weight tracking -> Click 'Program Management' -> Navigate to /program-management
Navigate to /coach-dashboard as a member -> See 'access denied' message or redirect to /login

features.name: Program Management
features.description: Enable coaches to create, edit, delete, and assign training programs with exercises, nutrition guides, and daily tasks.
user_flows: Navigate to /program-management -> Click Create new training program -> Fill program details (name, duration) -> Add exercises to program -> Add nutrition guides -> Add daily tasks -> Click Save program -> See new program listed on /program-management

Navigate to /program-management -> Click Create new training program -> Leave required fields empty -> Click Save program -> See validation errors highlighting required fields -> Remain on program creation form

features.name: Manage Availability
features.description: Allow coaches to view, add, and delete availability slots used by members when booking sessions.
user_flows: Navigate to /manage-availability -> View existing availability slots -> Click Add new time slot -> Fill date and time -> Fill slot capacity -> Click Save -> See new availability slot listed

Navigate to /manage-availability -> Click Add new time slot -> Fill date and time overlapping existing slot -> Fill slot capacity with zero -> Click Save -> See validation error 'invalid capacity or overlapping slot' -> Remain on availability form

routes.description: User login page with email and password
Member dashboard showing sessions, programs, and weight progress
Book training sessions with available coaches
Coach dashboard showing member sessions and progress
Create and manage training programs for members
Set availability slots for coaching sessions

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials for member and coach roles
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
Redirect to dashboard on successful login

features.name: Member Dashboard
features.description: Overview of upcoming sessions, training progress, and daily tasks

features.name: Session Booking
features.description: Book training sessions with available time slots

features.name: Training Programs
features.description: View and manage personalized training plans with exercises and nutrition

features.name: Weight Tracking
features.description: Record and visualize weight progress over time with charts

features.name: Coach Dashboard
features.description: Manage member bookings, view progress overview, and session tracking

features.name: Program Management
features.description: Create and edit training programs for members with exercises and nutrition

features.name: Manage Availability
features.description: Set and manage available time slots for coaching sessions

known_limitations.issue: Local JSON-based backend may reset data on server restart
known_limitations.impact: Test data persistence may be limited during testing
Frontend must be running on same machine or localhost
